ceo_goal: Which emerging technologies should Lufthansa prioritize to improve customer experience and reduce operational costs?

investigation_topics: Which emerging technologies should Lufthansa prioritize to improve customer experience and reduce operational costs?
plan.rationale: Fallback plan — LLM did not return structured output

key_findings: Lufthansa Group is prioritizing fleet modernization with new Boeing 787-9 aircraft and Airbus A320 upgrades
Strategic partnerships with Starlink for high-speed internet across all fleets
Collaboration with Amadeus to streamline travel booking processes via order ID system
risks: High capital expenditure for fleet renewal and technology integration
Potential delays in implementing automated flight profile transfer technology
opportunities: Enhanced customer experience through free high-speed internet for premium passengers
Operational efficiency gains from real-time flight path data and streamlined booking processes

recommendation.recommendation: Lufthansa should prioritize investing in fleet modernization with Boeing 787-9 aircraft and Airbus A320 upgrades, alongside Starlink's high-speed internet and Amadeus's order ID system to streamline bookings.
recommendation.expected_impact: Enhanced customer experience through free high-speed internet for premium passengers and operational efficiency gains from real-time flight data and streamlined booking processes. Reduced long-term costs via fuel-efficient aircraft and automated systems.
supporting_evidence: Strategic partnerships with Starlink for high-speed internet across all fleets
Collaboration with Amadeus to streamline travel booking processes via order ID system
Fleet modernization with new Boeing 787-9 aircraft and Airbus A320 upgrades
recommendation.risk_if_ignored: Lufthansa risks falling behind competitors in customer satisfaction and operational efficiency, leading to higher costs and reduced market share.
